title: Insurance Complaints - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Insurance Complaints 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DIVISION OF FINANCIAL REGULATION FINANCE, INSURANCE, AND STUDENT LOAN COMPLAINTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Fields complaints from individuals experiencing problems with a company or individual offering services in the finance or insurance industries. Examples of financial services include payday and title loans, consumer loans, student loans, mortgages, pawns, check cashing, investments, money transmission, and pre-need funeral trusts. Also provides a tool to report issues with state banks and credit unions, as well as data breaches. 350 Winter Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (888) 877-4894 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DIVISION OF FINANCIAL REGULATION FINANCE, INSURANCE, AND STUDENT LOAN COMPLAINTS
